passes.title: Charles River Museum Of Industry And Innovation
source_phrases: This pass is an e-voucher. Admits up to 4 at $5-off each (Not to be combined with other discounts; not valid for member pricing). Expires 11/30/26
For general information about the museum, please call 978-369-9763 or visit https://concordmuseum.org/.
The museum is open Tuesday - Sunday as well as some Monday holidays. Please confirm museum hours via phone or website before planning your visit.

passes.title: Concord Museum
source_phrases: The library’s pass admits up to 4 people into the museum  free of charge. Special event admission is not included under the library pass discount.
Free parking is available behind the museum with direct elevator access to our galleries.
Regular admission prices: Adults, $7; Seniors (65+) and Framingham residents with ID, $6; Students (High school + college (with ID), $5.00; Children under 13, free.

passes.title: The Danforth
source_phrases: This pass admits 3 visitors to Discovery Woods and the Discovery Museum at 1/2 price admission ($9.50) per person ; any additional visitors must pay the regular admission price of $19.00
Reservations are no longer needed or accepted. Please present this pass to Admissions staff when checking in and the discount will be applied to the cost of your visit.

This pass is an e-voucher - discount code will be included in reservation confirmation email which will be received upon reserving the pass. Please contact the reference desk at 781-259-8465 x204 with any questions about the pass.

passes.title: The Discovery Museums
source_phrases: Two passes per day. Each pass admits one person. 50% discount on admission, $1 fee for children.
Timed tickets are not necessary, but if purchasing in advance is preferred tickets can be purchased online at https://www.nativeplanttrust.org/visit/garden-woods/
If purchasing tickets in advance, choose the Library Pass option and bring the library pass with you to Garden in the Woods.
No discounts on classes, tours, or retail items.
Please note that schedule is subject to change and that hours will be reduced after October 18. Please be sure to check the  website for exact dates and hours before planning your visit.

passes.title: Garden In The Woods Native Plant Trust
passes.benefit_text:
Each pass permits two adults and two accompanied children to tour the
1806 Gore Mansion at the reduced rate of $5 per adult and free for the accompanying
children--regularly $16 per adult and $11 for children ages 6-16. The pass also permits
passholders to rent a Take-a-Walk bag for $2--regularly $5.
Story Time for two children at $5 per child and an accompanying adult free. 
Gore Place is open for Mansion Tours, currently Mondays, Wednesdays, Fridays, and Saturdays.
source_phrases: Each pass permits two adults and two accompanied children to tour the
1806 Gore Mansion at the reduced rate of $5 per adult and free for the accompanying
children--regularly $16 per adult and $11 for children ages 6-16. The pass also permits
passholders to rent a Take-a-Walk bag for $2--regularly $5.
Story Time for two children at $5 per child and an accompanying adult free.
Gore Place is open for Mansion Tours, currently Mondays, Wednesdays, Fridays, and Saturdays.
Days and times are subject to change, so it is best for visitors to consult the website at
goreplace.org when planning their visit. Event and holiday closings as well as school
vacation hours are all listed on the website.
Please note: The Mansion Tour pass is good for daytime Mansion tours only and
may not be used during evening or special themed tours or during special events such as the
Sheepshearing Festival at Gore Place.
Pass is e-voucher - all information will be provided in confirmation email.

passes.title: Harvard Museums Of Science And Culture
Historic New England
source_phrases: This pass discount provides $10 admission for up to 2 individuals. Advanced ticket reservations made in advance of visit are strongly encouraged on the museum's website. Directions and information regarding the digital pass use will be provided in your confirmation email.
A reminder that the address of the ICA is 25 Harbor Shore Drive, Boston, MA 02210.

More information on library membership, exhibitions, and programs can be found on our website at www.icaboston.org . For ticketing or general inquiries, please contact our Visitor Services team at visitorservices@icaboston.org. or by calling 617-478-3100.
Children under 17 are always free. Free Thursday nights 5:00 - 9:00 pm. Tickets for free Thursday nights are available online starting at 10 am on the day of the event.
Library Passes are not valid for performances, events, or films.

passes.title: Institute Of Contemporary Art Boston
source_phrases: Each pass provides up to four (4) people with a $5 discount per person—children under the age of 18 are always admitted free. Timed ticket reservations must be made in advance of visit with library e-voucher on the museum's website. Directions and information regarding e-voucher use will be provided in your confirmation email.
For more information about the museum, please visit https://www.gardnermuseum.org/visit.
MUSEUM HOURS:
WEEKDAYS 11 AM – 5 PM | WEEKENDS 10 AM – 5 PM | THURSDAYS 11 AM – 9 PM | CLOSED TUESDAYS
Please note that reserving a library pass does not guarantee that space will be available on your preferred date.

passes.title: Isabella Stewart Gardner Museum
passes.benefit_text: A valid Massachusetts library card grants the cardholder 50% off one admission ticket. In order to receive the discount, visitors must show their physical or digital Massachusetts library card to staff at the front desk. The discount is valid for the library card holder only. Each patron will need to present a Massachusetts library card in order to receive the discount. Children 12 and under receive free admission to the Museum.
source_phrases: A valid Massachusetts library card grants the cardholder 50% off one admission ticket. In order to receive the discount, visitors must show their physical or digital Massachusetts library card to staff at the front desk. The discount is valid for the library card holder only. Each patron will need to present a Massachusetts library card in order to receive the discount. Children 12 and under receive free admission to the Museum.

passes.title: John F Kennedy Library And Museum
source_phrases: This one-day Library Partner Admission Pass admits up to 4 people to a Mass Audubon wildlife sanctuary including (but not limited to) Drumlin Farm. With this pass, admission is discounted to $2 per visitor over the age of 2.
This pass is an e-voucher - there is nothing to pick up at the library.
Please visit https://www.massaudubon.org/get-outdoors/wildlife-sanctuaries/trails for the latest information, including safety guidelines.
Open hours and dates vary by sanctuary and some sites are open during some Monday holidays, so please contact Mass Audubon to confirm they are open before reserving the pass with the Library.

Please note that Drumlin Farm is currently open Tuesday–Sunday, as well as many Monday holidays.  Please check the website of the attraction you are interested in to confirm hours/schedule before planning your visit.

passes.title: Mass Audubon Drumlin Farm
source_phrases: Each pass admits 1 vehicle for free.   Please note that reserving a library pass does not guarantee that space will be available on your preferred date.  Passes may be checked out for 1 day and are due back before library opens the day following use.
This is a physical pass that must be picked up at the Reference Desk. Please call 781-259-8465 x 3 with any questions.
Please note that the Main Beach at Walden pond will be closed for the 2025 summer season due to construction.

passes.title: Massachusetts State Parks Department Of Conservation And Recreation
source_phrases: Each pass allows admission for 2 adults at $15 each (general admission and special exhibition) and up to 4 children ages 7–17 at $10 each (special exhibition only). There is no discount for children 7–17 for general admission, currently $10.  K-12 educators are always admitted for free with school ID. Children 6 and under are admitted free.

Pass provides discount code to be used for booking tickets online. Discount code provided in reservation email, or you can reach a librarian at 781-259-8465 (press 3)  lincoln@minlib.net to receive code by phone.

Timed tickets must be booked online at https://www.mfa.org/tickets.  ***When you reach the page for the date you have already chosen and "General Admission" at the top, you will find a PROMO CODE box at the top on the right.  Type in the Promo Code, and Submit, to see the Library Pass options appear.
Proof of COVID-19 vaccination to enter the Museum is no longer required in accordance with the City of Boston’s mandate. Please visit the page  here for more information.
Please note that reserving a library pass does not guarantee that space will be available on your preferred date.

passes.title: Museum Of Fine Arts
passes.benefit_text:
This pass will admit up to 4 people at a 50% discount on tickets to the Museum’s Exhibit Halls. Children under 3 are not included in the count of 4 and are always admitted for free.
Your Library pass can only be used on the date printed on the pass.
Please bring your library pass confirmation (printed or displayed on a phone) when you visit.
When you arrive at the Museum, stop at the Box Office to exchange your library pass and purchase your Exhibit Halls tickets at the discounted rate. If you have any questions or would like to reserve your Exhibit Halls passes in advance to avoid waiting in line the day of your visit, please call 617-723-2500 (9:00 a.m. – 5:00 p.m. daily).
If you are unable to show your Library confirmation on a phone, you may print out a copy using the link in the confirmation email or request a paper copy from the library.

If you are unable to show your Library confirmation on a phone, you may print out a copy using the link in the confirmation email or request a paper copy from the library.

passes.title: Museum Of Science
passes.benefit_text: This pass discount provides half price admission for up to 4 individuals including children. Redeem this coupon in the General Admission line at the Aquarium ticket booth. Directions and information regarding e-voucher use will be provided in your confirmation email.
source_phrases: This pass discount provides half price admission for up to 4 individuals including children. Redeem this coupon in the General Admission line at the Aquarium ticket booth. Directions and information regarding e-voucher use will be provided in your confirmation email.

passes.title: New England Aquarium
passes.benefit_text:
Each pass admits 2 guests at half-price.  Restrictions may apply for special or ticketed events.
Please visit the page here for up-to-date information and to reserve tickets in advance if preferred. Timed tickets purchased in advance are no longer required for entry to New England Botanic Garden, but may be reserved if preferred. Click here to book your tickets online. Promo code to use to receive the library discount when booking online provided in confirmation email. You must present both your ticket AND the physical library pass when you arrive. Walk-ins are permitted so it is not necessary to get your tickets in advance, but you must always present the physical library pass in order to receive the discount.
Please note that pass only applies to General Admission and cannot be used for Night Lights tickets.

Please note that pass only applies to General Admission and cannot be used for Night Lights tickets.

passes.title: New England Botanic Garden At Tower Hill
passes.benefit_text:
Discount ticket admits 2 adults at a reduced admission rate of  $12.00 per person any day the museum is open. Patrons may reserve up to 2 passes at a time. Children under 16 are always admitted free. Admission to Yin Yu Tang, the Chinese House, and special ticketed exhibitions may require a separate fee.
This pass is an e-voucher. The promo code to use to reserve discounted tickets is in the confirmation email generated when you reserve the pass from the library. Click on "print this pass" in the confirmation email to see the code.

This pass is an e-voucher. The promo code to use to reserve discounted tickets is in the confirmation email generated when you reserve the pass from the library. Click on "print this pass" in the confirmation email to see the code.

passes.title: Trustees Of The Reservations
passes.benefit_text:
Each pass admits up to 6 people. Charge is $9 per adult and $6 per child with pass. Admission for children under 2 is free. Passes can only be used for daytime admission and cannot be used for Stone Zoo Zoolights or Franklin Park Zoo Boston Lights . This pass does not need to be returned to the library. Timed ticket reservations are no longer required, but please check https://www.zoonewengland.org/ for any policy and schedule updates before planning your visit. 
Proof of vaccination is no longer required to visit the zoo. Learn more on Franklin Park Zoo's Health & Safety page.
